caveats: This was an exploratory single-seed development screen on an already exposed failed-V4 400-item curve; it is not confirmatory significance evidence.
The mechanical historical selector chose solved_u5_taper, but the later emotional-only decision makes all solved arms ineligible for prospective selection or confirmation.
No emotional arm passed the exact early step0->2->4->6 monotonic gate, although multiple emotional arms rose above baseline and celebration_taper ended at 0.42.

The output Volume contains emotional calibration bytes and all run outputs, but not the lens, solved calibration, curve manifest, or train-exclusion manifest bytes. This supplement embeds the JSON inputs recovered from canonical hash-matching files and records the lens by size/hash.

Complete scalar trainer and validation histories are embedded and can reconstruct experiment metric series without W&B. W&B platform system telemetry, console streams, generated-completion tables, and backend-specific internal metadata are not recoverable from these Volume files.
The local snapshot path is diagnostic and may be ephemeral; the source Volume name, complete file inventory, byte hashes, and canonical snapshot tree hash are the durable identities.
Training literal auditing is token-sequence based, while validation literal auditing is decoded-text whole-word based; compare those rates with that distinction.
The source-tree hash follows Path.read_bytes and therefore hashes resolved target contents for tracked symlinks rather than symlink target strings.

checks.evidence: every resolved_configs copy equals its run copy; run-manifest config_sha256 and resolved_config_sha256 equal those bytes
checks.name: config_copy_and_hash_linkage

checks.evidence: all seven common final/checkpoint files are byte-identical for every arm
checks.name: final_adapter_equals_checkpoint_25

checks.evidence: reward equals rewards/jlens_<label>_reward/mean exactly in all 200 optimization records
checks.name: j_lens_is_only_reward_function

metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.clip_ratio_metrics: Fractions of DAPO importance ratios clipped on low/high/combined regions.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.completions_clipped_ratio: Fraction of sampled completions that reached the 256-token generation cap.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.completions_length_metrics: Token-length min/mean/max; terminated-only fields summarize sequences that emitted EOS.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.entropy: Mean policy Shannon entropy in nats across unmasked completion tokens.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.exact_match: Mean of GSM8K numeric exact correctness across the fixed 400 greedy completions; extract the last ####-marked number, or otherwise the last numeric substring, normalize commas/currency/integer floats, then compare.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.frac_reward_zero_std: Fraction of prompt groups whose reward standard deviation is numerically zero.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.grad_norm: Gradient norm on non-validation-augmented logging rows.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.group_scaled_advantage: Reward minus prompt-group mean, divided by prompt-group SD plus 1e-4 because scale_rewards=group.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.jlens_label_mean: Python mean of the intrinsic scores returned for the sampled completions.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.learning_rate: Optimizer learning rate on non-validation-augmented logging rows.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.loss: DAPO policy loss over completion tokens using group-scaled intrinsic advantages, plus beta=0.02 reference-model KL penalty.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.num_tokens: Cumulative/generated token counter logged by the trainer.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.raw_jlens_score: Full-vocabulary-normalized log probability mass of the union of direct target token IDs after Jacobian-lens transport. Target occurrences and their causal predecessors are masked when mask_target_tokens=true.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.reward: Mean weighted aggregate reward. J-lens was the only reward function and its reward weight was 1.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.reward_std: Torch standard deviation of the sole intrinsic-reward outputs in the logged generation batch.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.rewards_jlens_label_reward_mean: Torch mean of the sole J-lens reward function; equals reward exactly.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.standardized_component_reward: For each score component: aggregate raw scores over its layer/fractional response window, subtract calibration mean, divide by calibration population SD, clip to [-5,5], multiply by component weight; sum components.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.step_time: Wall-clock seconds attributed to that optimization step.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.terminal_summary: Final train runtime, loss, throughput, epoch, step, and FLOP summary; it shares step=25 with the final optimization record and is distinguished by record_index.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.training_jlens_literal_rate: Fraction of sampled completion token sequences containing any complete lower/title/upper target spelling, including boundary and multi-token variants.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.validation_literal_target_completion_rat: Fraction of decoded validation completions containing at least one target as a case-insensitive whole word.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.validation_mean_length: Mean generated completion-token count, including EOS when EOS is present.
metric_semantics_from_pinned_code.wandb_reconstruction: For scalar experiment series, use each arm trainer_log_history in record order; trainer_numeric_series is an exact derived expansion with record_index and training step. Use validation_history for the initial step-0 evaluation and fixed-curve identity. Typical W&B Trainer keys are namespaced under train/.

geometry.positions: range(19, token_length, 20), falling back to final position
geometry.statistic: mean and population standard deviation of target-token-set log probability mass

source.source_tree_hash_algorithm: repository_provenance at the pinned commit: sorted tracked path UTF-8 || NUL || Path.read_bytes content || NUL; tracked symlinks therefore hash resolved target bytes

schemas.trainer_history_note: Each arm embeds the complete raw 26-record trainer history plus a deterministic numeric metric-to-series expansion. Validation step 0 is retained separately in validation_history.

attempt_manifest.gate_criterion: step2 > step0 and step4 >= step2 and step6 >= step4

source_volume.name: j-lens-rl-alternative-screen-v1-20260714b
source_volume.tree_hash_algorithm: SHA-256 over each file in lexicographic remote-relative-path order: path UTF-8 || NUL || raw file bytes || NUL
